title: Expand corpus tests to all ported grammars
description: The corpus test runner (internal/corpustest/) currently only runs against JSON. Expand it to run corpus tests for ALL ported grammars: Go, JavaScript, Python, Bash, Rust, C, TypeScript, C++, CSS, HTML, Ruby, Perl, Java, Zsh. For each grammar: (1) ensure the grammar's test/corpus/ .txt files are fetched via make fetch-test-grammars, (2) add a TestCorpus<Language> function in corpus_test.go (or a separate file) that loads the grammar and runs all corpus tests, (3) track pass/fail counts per grammar and document any known failures. This is the single highest-value test expansion — it validates all scanner ports against real expected parse trees. Reference: docs/testing-strategy.md Section 2.
